code: import React from'react';import FinancialSummary from'./FinancialSummary';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Dashboard=_ref=>{let{dashboardData,jobs}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dashboard-content",children:[jobs&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FinancialSummary,{jobs:jobs}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recent-activity",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Recent Activity"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"activity-list",children:dashboardData.recentActivities.map(activity=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"activity-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"activity-status ".concat(activity.type),children:[activity.type==='completed'&&'COMPLETED',activity.type==='scheduled'&&'SCHEDULED',activity.type==='new'&&'NEW REQUEST']}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"activity-details",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{children:activity.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:activity.time})]})]},activity.id))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"quick-actions",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Quick Actions"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"action-buttons",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"action-btn primary",children:"Schedule New Job"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"action-btn secondary",children:"Add Client"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"action-btn secondary",children:"Generate Quote"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"action-btn secondary",children:"View Calendar"})]})]})]});};export default Dashboard;
